metadata.title: Breakpoint 2026
metadata.description: A new single-page brochure for Breakpoint 2026 in London.

hero.title: Breakpoint 2026
hero.blurb: Three days of product reveals, ecosystem strategy, builders, investors, and culture. Breakpoint returns November 15-17 at Olympia London with a tighter single-page story and a sharper visual identity.

overview.title: The Solana ecosystem's highest-signal annual gathering.
overview.body: Breakpoint is where roadmap decisions become public, products go from preview to launch, and operators across the ecosystem align on what comes next. The 2026 edition is built as a concentrated event story instead of a maze of brochure pages.
highlights: A single-page event narrative that puts timing, venue, value, and conversion above brochure sprawl.
Programming designed for founders, developers, operators, investors, and ecosystem partners in the same room.
A new 2026 composition informed by Breakpoint's core palette, typography, and shader texture direction.

audience.title: Built for the people shaping what's next on Solana.

cards.title: Builders
cards.body: Founder-led product sessions, developer launches, technical walkthroughs, and the kind of hallway conversation that changes shipping priorities.

cards.title: Capital
cards.body: Investors, market-makers, and operators get a clear read on where attention, liquidity, and infrastructure are moving next.

cards.title: Culture
cards.body: Breakpoint is also where the ecosystem gathers socially, with side events, community energy, and live moments that travel beyond the venue.

video.title: See the energy before you land in London.
video.body: The current Breakpoint sizzle reel stays in the experience, but the presentation is rebuilt for the 2026 brochure so it feels native to this app rather than inherited from the old site.
video.caption: Existing Breakpoint sizzle video, embedded as the v1 featured media section.

logistics.title: Venue and timing, surfaced without friction.

london.title: London gives Breakpoint a stronger global center of gravity.
london.body: London connects European builders, global capital, policy conversations, and the media ecosystem in one city. For Solana, it creates a strategic meeting point where technical ambition and institutional attention can compound.
reasons: A practical bridge between North American, European, Middle Eastern, and Asian participants.
Dense proximity to developers, financial institutions, founders, and press.
A city that can support both flagship keynotes and the wider community calendar around the event.

cta.title: Hold your place for the next Breakpoint release cycle.
cta.body: The primary destination is intentionally a placeholder until launch operations finalize the production flow. The label and href live in localized content so they can be swapped without touching the page structure.
